sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint requires clinically sufficient transcript coverage but does not serialize the threshold.
decisionTaken: Use phase2-coverage-sufficiency-191.v1: at least six words, at least one transcript or structured signal, complete segments, complete extraction, and medium or high quality.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It separates transcript completion from clinical usability and gives later gates a reproducible law.
operationalRisk: Short but meaningful recordings may route to manual review until policy evidence supports a lower threshold.
